title: ipomoea aculeata var. aculeata
intro: Ipomoea aculeata var. aculeata, also known as the prickly morning glory, is a plant species that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating wounds. The herbal preparations of Ipomoea aculeata var. aculeata include teas, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to alleviate various health conditions.
